tagline: Six build milestones + capstone. Real data, graded projects, staff-engineer bar.

milestones.title: Neural Signal Viewer
milestones.shortDescription: Load a recording, plot the trace, threshold candidate spikes, export an event table.

milestones.title: Spike Detector + Feature Vector
milestones.shortDescription: Event detection, spike count + RMS + band-power features across trials.

milestones.title: Noise Smoother & Drift Corrector
milestones.shortDescription: Baseline correction, drift compensation, before/after stability metrics.

milestones.title: Weighted Linear Decoder
milestones.shortDescription: Inspectable weights, train vs held-out accuracy, overfitting diagnosis.

milestones.title: Cursor Simulator + Latency
milestones.shortDescription: Closed-loop cursor with 0/80/150ms latency injection and strategy notes.

milestones.title: Closed-Loop BCI Capstone
milestones.shortDescription: End-to-end pipeline + design-review memo: drift, detection, response, safety, next step.
